mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (id, box_id, name, description, image_url, qr_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by, in_use_by_user_id, in_use_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{boxId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{qrCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{inUseByUserId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{inUseAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, box_id, name, description, image_url, qr_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by, in_use_by_user_id, in_use_at, deleted_at FROM items WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT i.id, i.box_id, i.name, i.description, i.image_url, i.qr_code, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.created_by, i.in_use_by_user_id, i.in_use_at, i.deleted_at FROM items i WHERE (i.id::text = #{idOrQrUuid} OR i.qr_code = #{idOrQrUuid}) LIMIT 1

SELECT i.id, i.box_id, b.name as box_name, b.location as box_location, i.name, i.description, i.image_url, i.qr_code, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.in_use_by_user_id, u.nickname as in_use_by_user_name, i.in_use_at, i.deleted_at FROM items i LEFT JOIN boxes b ON i.box_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON i.in_use_by_user_id = u.id WHERE i.box_id = #{boxId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY i.deleted_at IS NULL DESC, i.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT i.id, i.box_id, i.name, i.description, i.image_url, i.qr_code, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.created_by, i.in_use_by_user_id, i.in_use_at, i.deleted_at FROM items i INNER JOIN boxes b ON i.box_id = b.id WHERE i.box_id = #{boxId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND b.organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND i.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE items SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM items WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT c.name FROM item_categories ic INNER JOIN categories c ON ic.category_id = c.id WHERE ic.item_id = #{itemId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM item_categories WHERE item_id = #{itemId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.select: WITH existing AS ( SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name = #{categoryName} AND organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} LIMIT 1 ), inserted AS ( INSERT INTO categories (id, organization_id, name, created_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{categoryName}, NOW() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing) RETURNING id ) SELECT id FROM existing UNION ALL SELECT id FROM inserted
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items WHERE created_by = #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND deleted_at IS NULL
